name: authz-playgrounds
description: Authz learning playground — TypeSpec contracts and shared tooling

scripts.fmt: npm run fmt:deno && npm run fmt:web
scripts.fmt:deno: deno fmt services/auth/src services/auth/tests services/memo/src services/memo/tests pkg/api-client
scripts.fmt:deno:check: deno fmt --check services/auth/src services/auth/tests services/memo/src services/memo/tests pkg/api-client
scripts.lint: npm run lint:deno && npm run lint:eslint && npm run lint:web
scripts.lint:deno: deno lint services/auth services/memo && deno lint --config pkg/api-client/deno.json pkg/api-client
scripts.lint:all: npm run fmt:deno:check && npm run lint && npm run fmt:web:check
